chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1395 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on CMA No.5368/2025 (Ex.A) 2. For hearing of main case 13-10-2025 Mr. Rehmat Ali Shaikh, Advocate for the Petitioners Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< Learned counsel for the Petitioners does not press instant Constitutional Petition and requests for permission to file afresh one separately for each Petitioner, who have the certificates in accordance with the Act, 2018; however, for the remaining Petitioners, who have no such certificate, he submits that they firstly approach the Board for obtaining such certificate and thereafter apply for redressal of their grievances. The Petition is disposed of as not pressed. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
